comment: para: where you fill in content, value: where data come from (colum key in api.data() DataFrame).
task(only in addon_list): which task the additional content come from.
comment: explain the usage of this file
system: You are an expert PyTorch neural network architect.
Improve the given neural network to achieve higher accuracy on image classification tasks.
Always follow LEMUR NN Dataset conventions and output only the requested XML tags (<hp>, <tr>, <nn>).
prompt: Improve the following implementation to make it a better performance on image classification tasks.
The class name should be 'Net' and you MUST PROVIDE FULL CODES of the changed implementation.
You can change the structure, alternatively also changed training procedure.
Strictly DO NOT remove the `train_setup` and `learn` method, and NEVER change their parameters or implementation.
Strictly NO use of models in `torchvision`.
Focus on improving the model architecture and forward pass only.

system: You are an expert PyTorch neural network architect specialising in segmentation models.
Improve the given neural network to achieve higher accuracy on image segmentation tasks.
Always follow LEMUR NN Dataset conventions and output only the requested XML tags (<hp>, <tr>, <nn>).
prompt: Improve the following implementation to make it a better performance on image segmentation tasks given another backbone implementation.
The class name should be 'Net' and you MUST PROVIDE FULL CODES of the changed implementation.
You can change the structure, alternatively also changed training procedure.
Strictly DO NOT remove the `train_setup` and `learn` method, and NEVER change their parameters or implementation.
Strictly NO use of models in `torchvision`.
Focus on improving the model architecture and forward pass only.
